title: Project Report: Sales Pipeline with Power Platform ALM — Dynamics 365 CRM Consultant
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
project_title: Sales Pipeline with Power Platform ALM
summary: Full sales solution in managed solution: dev → test → prod with plugins, flows, and security roles.
objectives: Security roles for sales rep and manager
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Advanced)*

**Sales Pipeline with Power Platform ALM** is a advanced-level end-to-end project for Dynamics 365 CRM Consultant. Duration: 4–5 weeks. Full sales solution in managed solution: dev → test → prod with plugins, flows, and security roles. Tools: Dataverse, Plugin Registration Tool, Azure DevOps.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: Managed solution with all customizations
Objective: Plugin for opportunity validation
Objective: ALM pipeline across 3 environments
Objective: Security roles for sales rep and manager
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Dynamics 365 CRM Consultant portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Dynamics 365 CRM Consultant resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Dynamics 365 CRM Consultant resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Advanced)*

Submit all final deliverables: Managed solution; Plugin code; ALM doc; Security matrix. Skills demonstrated: ALM, Plugins, Security. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: Managed solution
Deliverable: Plugin code
Deliverable: ALM doc
Deliverable: Security matrix
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits Managed solution and passes the rubric.
